verse_text: They answered and said, 'Caesar's.' And He said to them, 'Render therefore to Caesar the things that are Caesar's, and to God the things that are God's.'

pericope.title: Do We Pay Taxes to Caesar?

links.context: While God commands our obedience to governing authorities ([[LUK.20:25]]; [[ROM.13:1]]- 7), obedience to God comes first. When the two are in conflict, the believer must follow God and be willing to accept the consequences.
